title: Secondo uno studio dell'università di Urbino l'algoritmo di Facebook ora punisce la politica ufficiale e premia gli estremisti antieuropei. Pd e FdI verso una legge bipartisan sulle piattaforme
snippet: This Open article discusses a study by Professor Fabio Giglietto of the University of Urbino, published January 7, 2026, which concludes that Facebook's algorithm punishes official political content while promoting anti-European extremists. This research is leading to discussions in the Italian Parliament for a bipartisan law on platforms.
description: This Open.online article discusses a recent study by Professor Fabio Giglietto of the University of Urbino, published January 7, 2026, finding that Facebook's algorithm favors anti-European extremists over official political content. The research is leading to discussions for a bipartisan law on platforms in the Italian Parliament.
